name: Puerto Rico Reduced Dividend Withholding Rate

eligibility.description: Must be a corporation organized in Puerto Rico meeting the requirements of section 881(b)(1) and the local Puerto Rican withholding tax must not exceed 10%.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Reduces the standard 30% withholding rate to 10% for dividends received by a Puerto Rican corporation that meets specific ownership and income tests.
